name: wayback-job-history
title: Wayback Job History + Ghost Detector
description: Reconstructs the full historical job posting timeline for any company career page using the Wayback Machine CDX API. Uses Gemini AI to detect ghost jobs — positions posted for months with no intention of being filled.

batchMode.title: Batch / discovery mode
batchMode.description: Run on multiple companies at once with a Gemini-guided discovery loop. Uses the built-in seed list (Accenture, Deloitte, KPMG, etc.) unless you supply a custom companies list.

companies.title: Companies (batch mode)
companies.description: Override the seed list. Each item: { name, portalUrl, inventoryMode? }. Leave empty to use the built-in list of known ghost-job offenders.

discoveryRounds.title: Discovery rounds (batch mode)
discoveryRounds.description: After each round, Gemini suggests more companies to investigate. Total rounds including the seed round.

portalUrl.title: Career portal URL (single-company mode)
portalUrl.description: The company's career page URL. Examples: https://boards.greenhouse.io/stripe, https://jobs.lever.co/openai, https://accenture.wd3.myworkdayjobs.com/AccentureCareers

companyName.title: Company name (single-company mode)
companyName.description: Human-readable company name for reports (e.g. 'Accenture'). Auto-detected from URL if omitted.

startDate.title: Start date (YYYY-MM-DD)
startDate.description: Earliest date to analyze. Defaults to 1 year ago.

endDate.title: End date (YYYY-MM-DD)
endDate.description: Latest date to analyze. Defaults to today.

inventoryMode.title: Inventory mode
inventoryMode.description: If true: uses CDX prefix search to find ALL archived job URLs and track each job's lifespan. Best for Workday/SPA portals. If false (default): fetches one archived listing page per day. Best for Greenhouse/Lever/Ashby.

maxSnapshots.title: Max snapshots / job URLs
maxSnapshots.description: In snapshot mode: max daily snapshots to process. In inventory mode: rough ceiling on job URLs to analyze (actual = this × 2).

delayMs.title: Delay between requests (ms)
delayMs.description: Milliseconds to wait between Wayback Machine requests.

googleAiApiKey.title: Google AI API key (Gemini)
googleAiApiKey.description: Override the actor secret for Gemini analysis. Leave blank to use the GOOGLE_AI_API_KEY secret.
